recommendations.title: And Their Children After Them
recommendations.overview: In eastern France, two teenage cousins have the summer of their lives when they paddle a purloined canoe to the far shore of a lake.

recommendations.title: Now and Then
recommendations.overview: Waxing nostalgic about the bittersweet passage from childhood to puberty, four childhood girlfriends — Teeny, Chrissy, Samantha and Roberta — recall the magical summer of 1970. During their walk down memory lane, they reconcile experiences with boys,

recommendations.title: Daisies
recommendations.overview: Two teenage girls embark on a series of destructive pranks in which they consume and destroy the world around them.

recommendations.title: The Edge of Seventeen
recommendations.overview: Two high school girls are best friends until one dates the other's older brother, who is totally his sister's nemesis.

recommendations.title: Mektoub, My Love: Canto Uno
recommendations.overview: Amin, an aspiring screenwriter living in Paris, returns home for the summer, in Sète, South of France. It is a time of reconnecting with his family and his childhood friends. Together with his cousin Tony and his best friend Ophélie, he spends his ti

recommendations.title: The Inbetweeners 2
recommendations.overview: Neil, Will and Simon receive an invite from Jay to join him in Australia whilst on his gap year, who promises them it’s ”the sex capital of the world”. With their lives now rather dull compared to their hedonistic school days and legendary lads holid

recommendations.title: Never Rarely Sometimes Always
recommendations.overview: A pair of teenage girls in rural Pennsylvania travel to New York City to seek out medical help after an unintended pregnancy.

recommendations.title: Boys State
recommendations.overview: This raucous journey into the heart of democracy captures an unusual rite of passage: 1,100 teenage boys from across Texas coming together to build a representative government from the ground up.

recommendations.title: Goodbye June
recommendations.overview: Four siblings' lives change drastically when their ailing mother takes a turn for the worse over the holiday season.

recommendations.title: God's Own Country
recommendations.overview: A young farmer in rural Yorkshire numbs his daily frustrations with binge drinking and casual sex, until the arrival of a Romanian migrant worker.
